name: deve-copilot-remote
description: VS Code extension that lets you drive the native Copilot chat panel from a mobile device.

commands.title: DeveCopilotRemote: Summarize Active File In Chat

deveCopilotRemote.defaultMode.description: Default chat mode used when sending prompts to the native chat panel. Use 'current' to keep the mode already selected in VS Code.

deveCopilotRemote.blockOnResponse.description: Wait for the chat.open command to resolve when the native chat response reaches a terminal state.

deveCopilotRemote.webUi.autoStart.description: Start the local web UI server when the extension activates.

deveCopilotRemote.webUi.host.description: Host interface for the web UI server.

deveCopilotRemote.webUi.port.description: Port used by the mobile web UI server.

deveCopilotRemote.webUi.authMode.description: Authentication mode. 'token' generates a new random token each session. 'password' uses a static password that persists across sessions.

deveCopilotRemote.webUi.password.description: Static password for the web UI (used when authMode is 'password'). The password is hashed before transmission.

scripts.compile: cd webui && npm install && npm run build && cd .. && node esbuild.js
